description: Paracetamol may increase anticoagulant effect; risk of bleeding.
action: Monitor INR if used together; discuss with doctor.

description: Amoxicillin can increase methotrexate levels; risk of toxicity.
action: Doctor may need to adjust dose or monitor; do not combine without medical supervision.

description: Increased risk of rash when combined.
action: Discuss with doctor; watch for skin reactions.

description: Omeprazole may reduce effectiveness of clopidogrel (blood thinner).
action: Discuss with doctor; alternative acid reducer may be considered.

description: Less interaction than omeprazole with clopidogrel; may still discuss with doctor.
action: Usually acceptable; confirm with doctor if on clopidogrel.

description: Both are antihistamines; taking both may increase drowsiness or dry mouth.
action: Usually one antihistamine is enough; discuss with doctor.
Take azithromycin at least 1 hour before or 2 hours after antacids.

description: Erythromycin can increase atorvastatin levels; risk of muscle side effects.
action: Discuss with doctor; may need to avoid combination or adjust dose.

description: Grapefruit juice can increase atorvastatin levels.
action: Limit or avoid grapefruit juice while on atorvastatin; discuss with doctor.
